login.chooseHow: Choose how you want to use CourtFlow
login.selectVenueDesc: Choose which venue to manage today
login.signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage your courts
login.noVenueAssigned: No venue assigned. Contact an admin.
login.noVenueCreateAdmin: No venue assigned. Create one from the Admin Dashboard first.
login.connectionError: Unable to connect right now. Please try again later.

profile.title: Profile
profile.sharedDeviceHint: This device may be shared between staff members. Log out at the end of your shift.
profile.logOutConfirmBody: You will be signed out of this device. The next staff member can log in with their own credentials.

dashboard.title: Staff Dashboard
dashboard.noActiveSessionHint: Open a session so players can check in and warm up.
dashboard.noActiveSessionOpenFromCourts: Go to the Courts tab to open a session.
dashboard.warmupManualHint: Go to Queue tab to assign players to courts.
dashboard.warmupAutoHint: Players are being assigned to courts as they arrive.
dashboard.dissolveGroupConfirm: Dissolve this group? Players will become solo in the queue.
dashboard.closeSessionConfirm: Close this session? All queuing players will be notified.
dashboard.noReplacement: Player removed. No replacement available in the queue.
dashboard.manualPickerHint: Choose up to {{max}} players ({{selected}} selected). Order follows the queue.
dashboard.manualPickerGenderMixWarning: This lineup isn’t a standard 2–2 mixed doubles or an all-men / all-women game. You can still assign.
dashboard.manualPickerGenderMixBeforeFourth: Adding another {{gender}} would not follow standard 2–2 mixed or all-men / all-women lineups. You can still assign.
dashboard.manualPickerEmpty: No one is waiting in the queue.
dashboard.manualPickerSortToggleAria: Sort by queue order or name
dashboard.queueFilterBreakAria: Show only players on a break
dashboard.queueFilterBreakEmpty: No players on a break right now.
dashboard.fillFromQueuePrompt: Fill {{court}} from the queue anyway? Players go to warm-up on this court; end warm-up when you are ready.
dashboard.addCourtBody: This court will become active in the current session and players may be assigned to it immediately.
dashboard.removeCourtBody: This will remove the court from the current session. Any active game on this court will be affected.
dashboard.removeCourtConfirmBody: Please confirm you want to remove {{label}} from this session. Players on this court will need to be reassigned.
dashboard.setIdleBody1: The TV will show this court as on stand by. Start a new game or assign players from the queue when you are ready — the court returns automatically.
dashboard.setIdleBody2: Use this when you want people off the court and back in the queue (now or soon) without going through reassignment on other courts.
dashboard.setIdleBody3: All other courts will continue to operate normally.
dashboard.setIdleHint: Open this court and use Start new game or Assign players to bring it back.
dashboard.standbyCourtHint: Stand-by on TV. Use the actions below to reopen this court — no separate restore step.
dashboard.endGameBody: This will end the current game, requeue the players, and assign the next group from the queue.
dashboard.startNewGameConfirmBody: Players on {{label}} will be sent back to the queue and the next 4 players will be assigned.
dashboard.replacePickerHint: Choose one solo waiting player ({{selected}} of {{max}} selected).
dashboard.replacePlayerBody: This player will be removed from {{court}} and sent back to the queue. A replacement will be pulled from the queue.
dashboard.confirmReplacementBody: {{name}} will be immediately removed and a new player assigned to {{court}}. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.historyEmptyHint: Session statistics will appear here after you close a session.
dashboard.noSoloPlayersHint: Players must be waiting and not already in a group.
dashboard.setupTvDesc: Get the URL to display courts on a TV screen
dashboard.playerScanQr: Players scan this code to join {{venue}}
dashboard.noSessionQrWarning: No active session — players can sign up but won't be able to join a game yet.
dashboard.displayQrHint: Display this QR code at the entrance so players go directly to the right venue.
dashboard.tvSetupSubtitle: Show live court status on a TV screen for {{venue}}
dashboard.tvUrlHint: Open the TV browser and type this URL. You'll pick the venue on screen.
dashboard.tvCameraHint: If the TV has a camera or QR scanner, this links directly to the right venue.
dashboard.sendTestNotif: Send Test Notification to All Players
dashboard.courtTapToStart: Tap to start a new game →
dashboard.manualPickerEmpty: No players waiting in the queue.
dashboard.manualAssignError: Could not assign one or more players. Try again.

checkIn.title: Check-in
checkIn.subtitle: Add walk-in players to the queue. They appear under the Queue tab.
checkIn.duplicateName: This name is already used by someone in the queue this session.
checkIn.requiredFields: Name, gender, and skill level are required.
checkIn.name: Name
